err.generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
start.body: Hi %s 👋 Welcome to your TON wallet. 💰 Available: %s TON 🎁 Credit: %s TON Total: %s TON Choose an option below:
home.hint: Use the buttons below or the menu.
wallet.body: 👛 Your wallet 💰 Available: %s TON 🎁 Credit: %s TON Total: %s TON%s 📥 Deposit address: %s 🏷 Your pay handle: %s Share it so others can transfer to you.
deposit.menu: 📥 Deposit TON Pick an amount to create an invoice, or tap “Custom amount”. With “Any amount” you can deposit without specifying a value.
deposit.bad_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a positive number.
deposit.body: 📥 Deposit invoice 1) Send this amount to: %s 2) In the Comment/Memo field write exactly this code: %s ⚠️ Without this code your deposit cannot be matched. After paying, tap “Check deposit”.
deposit.error: ❌ Could not create a deposit invoice. Try again later.
withdraw.insufficient: 📤 To withdraw you need at least %s TON (plus a %s TON fee).
withdraw.ask_addr: 📤 Withdraw TON Withdrawable balance: %s TON Network fee: %s TON Send the destination TON address:
withdraw.bad_addr: ❌ Invalid TON address. It must start with UQ or EQ and be 48 characters.
withdraw.ask_amount: 🎯 To: %s…%s Enter the amount to withdraw in TON. Max possible: %s TON (a %s TON fee is deducted).
withdraw.bad_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a positive number.
withdraw.confirm: 📤 Confirm withdrawal Amount: %s TON Fee: %s TON Total deducted: %s TON To: %s Confirm?
withdraw.submitted: ✅ Withdrawal request submitted. Amount: %s TON (fee %s TON) To: %s Tracking ID: %s It will be paid after admin approval.
history.title: 🧾 Transaction history
help.body: ❓ TON wallet help 👛 Wallet — balance & deposit address 📥 Deposit — top up with TON 📤 Withdraw — send TON to an external address 🔁 Transfer — send to another user by handle or numeric ID 🧾 History — your transactions All amounts are in TON. Always include the Comment code when depositing.
transfer.insufficient: 🔁 Your balance is not enough to transfer.
transfer.ask_id: 🔁 Internal transfer Send the recipient's pay handle (e.g. u_ab12cd) or their numeric Telegram ID:
transfer.bad_id: ❌ Invalid recipient. Send a valid pay handle or numeric ID.
transfer.no_recipient: ❌ No recipient found with that handle/ID.
transfer.ask_amount: Recipient: %s Your balance: %s TON Enter the amount to transfer in TON:
transfer.bad_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Enter a positive number.
check.pending: ⏳ No deposit seen for this invoice yet.
check.unconfirmed: ⏳ Your deposit isn't fully confirmed yet. Check again shortly.
check.confirmed: ✅ Deposit of %s TON confirmed. New balance: %s TON
deposit.confirmed: ✅ %s TON landed in your wallet. New balance: %s TON
notify.withdraw_done: ✅ Your withdrawal of %s TON was processed and sent. 🔗 Transaction hash: %s
notify.withdraw_rejected: 🚫 Your withdrawal of %s TON was rejected and refunded to your wallet. Reason: %s
notify.credit_added: 🎁 %s TON credit was added to your wallet. New balance: %s TON
notify.payment: 💸 %s TON was deducted from your wallet for “%s”. New balance: %s TON
admin.dashboard: 🛠 botpay admin panel 👥 Wallets: %d 📥 Total deposits: %s TON 💸 Total payments: %s TON ⏳ Pending withdrawals: %d 🏦 Platform balance: %s TON 🔒 Frozen: %s TON
admin.withdraws_title: 💸 Pending withdrawals (%d) Tap an item to view details or approve/reject.
admin.withdraw_detail: 💸 Withdrawal %s Amount: %s TON Fee: %s TON Net payout: %s TON To: %s Date: %s User note: %s
admin.ask_txhash: 🧾 To approve withdrawal %s, send the on-chain transaction hash:
admin.ask_reason: ✍️ Write the rejection reason for withdrawal %s (shown to the user):
admin.rejected: 🚫 Withdrawal %s rejected and refunded to the user.
admin.wallet_not_found: ❌ No wallet found for this user.
admin.ask_credit_userid: ➕ Add credit Send the user's numeric Telegram ID:
admin.ask_credit_amount: Enter the credit amount in TON for user %d:
admin.credit_confirm: ➕ Add %s TON credit to user %d. Confirm?
admin.ask_lookup: 🔎 Send the user's numeric Telegram ID or pay handle:
admin.user_card: 👤 User %d 💰 Available: %s TON 🎁 Credit: %s TON Total: %s TON 🔒 Frozen: %s TON 📥 Address: %s 🏷 Handle: %s
admin.user_not_found: ❌ No user found with those details.
admin.chain_ok: ✅ Hash chain is intact. Blocks: %d No signs of tampering.
admin.chain_broken: 🚨 Warning: hash chain is broken! First broken block: %d Reason: %s This indicates possible database tampering. Investigate immediately.
